title: Korak 5

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import string


# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation
challengeFiles.seed:
import string


# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation

tests.text: Trebalo bi da deklarišete parametar koji se zove all_characters.
Treba da povežete letters, digits, sa symbols i postavite te rezultate u vaš parametar all_characters.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
    import string
    from itertools import permutations
    perms = permutations([string.ascii_letters, string.digits, string.punctuation])
    any("".join(perm) == all_characters for perm in perms)
  `))
})

description: Sada deklariš parametar pod nazivom all_characters i postavi mu vrednost na rezultat kombinovanja vaših postojećih parametara.
